title: Withered Bone Meal
description: Withered Bone Meal grows Nether Wart, generates Wither Roses and kills plants
body:
# Withered Bone Meal
[![Chat with me on Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://discord.offsetmonkey538.top/)
[![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/withered-bone-meal)
[![Available on Codeberg](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/codeberg_vector.svg)](https://codeberg.org/OffsetMods538/Withered-Bone-Meal)  
[![Requires MonkeyLib538](https://codeberg.org/OffsetMods538/MonkeyLib538/raw/branch/master/images/requires_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/monkeylib538)
[![Requires Loot Table Modifier](https://codeberg.org/OffsetMods538/Loot-Table-Modifier/raw/branch/master/images/requires_badge.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/loot-table-modifier)

## What's this?
Ever wanted for nether wart to grow faster?  
What about getting wither roses easily?  
How about making plants *die*? (I know you love doing that!)  
Still not impressed? How about doing *all of the above*, but with a *dispenser*?

Well, **Withered Bone Meal** can do just that!

## How this?

Wither skeletons now drop **Withered Bones**, which can be crafted into Withered Bone Meal.  
Withered Bone Meal can be crafted into decorative Withered Bone Blocks, or used for any of the following actions:
### List of interactions:
- **Replaced** - These blocks are replaced with something else.
  - **Grass, Mycelium, Podzol, Rooted Dirt** - Replaced with Dirt.
  - **Muddy Mangrove Roots** - Replaced with Mud.
  - **(Tall) Flowers** - Replaced with Wither Rose.
  - **Coral** - Replaced with dead variant.
- **Ignored** - These blocks are ignored.
    - **Wither Rose**
    - **Crimson/Warped Roots**
    - **Nether Sprouts**
- **Grown** - These blocks are grown.
    - **Nether Wart** - Grown to the next growth stage, ignored if at the last one.
- **Vanilla Bone Meal** - These blocks have the same interaction as with vanilla Bone Meal.
    - **Nylium** - Spreads roots, fungi and nether sprouts.
    - **Netherrack** - Turns into Nylium if there is Nylium nearby.
    - **Fungi** - Grows into Huge Fungi. 
- **Other**
  - **Crops** - Reverted to previous growth stage, killed if at the last one.
  - **Other Plants** - Removed.

###### This mod collects anonymous usage statistics, read more about what's collected [here](https://monkeylib538.docs.offsetmonkey538.top/reference/telemetry/). No personally identifiable data is stored. Telemetry can be disabled by modifying the config at `config/monkeylib538/telemetry.json` or by running the `/monkeylib538 telemetry set isEnabled false` command.
